mapper.select: select count(*) cnt from member where email = #{email}
select email from member where email = #{email}
select count(*) cnt from member where mid = #{mid} and mname = #{mname} and email = #{email}
select count(*) cnt from member where mid = #{mid}
mapper.update: update member set password=#{password} where mid=#{mid}
update member set color=#{color} where mid=#{mid}
mapper.select: SELECT mname,mid,email,password,color FROM MEMBER WHERE mid=#{mid}
